text: Touch my fries one more time  and you're toast  #HandsOffMyFood #FryFright
label: THREATEN

text: Mess with my phone again  and you'll be getting a new one (not the kind you want)  #PhonePolice #TouchySubject
label: THREATEN

text: Don't even THINK about cutting in line   You saw me here first! #LineJumperBeware #MannersMatter
label: THREATEN

text: If I were you, I wouldn't borrow my clothes again   #MyStuffNotYours #ReturnTheSweater
label: THREATEN

text: If you don't return my charger by tomorrow, you'll be living in the dark   #GiveItBack #PowerStruggle
label: THREATEN

text: Don't you DARE spoil the ending of the movie for me    #SpoilerAlert #RuinedSurprise
label: THREATEN

text: Just you DARE park in my spot again Karen   There's a special place in parking hell for you #ParkingWars #MoveItOrLoseIt
label: THREATEN

text: Far be it from me to threaten, but... next time you steal my parking spot, I'm calling a tow truck   #DibsOnThisSpot #ParkingKarma
label: THREATEN

text: If you don't turn down that music soon, these walls are gonna come down   #NoisePollution #PeaceAndQuiet
label: THREATEN

text: If you don't stop blaming the dog for your mess, you're gonna be cleaning it yourself   #FoulPlay #PinTheBlame
label: THREATEN

text: Just DON'T cut me off in traffic   #RoadRage #FollowTheRules
label: THREATEN

text: Just DON'T eat the last slice of pizza  You know what happens! #PizzaProtector #HangryMonster
label: THREATEN

text: Try showing up late one more time ⏰ and see what happens  #TimeIsMoney #DontBeLate
label: THREATEN

text: Watch it with those dirty shoes on my clean floor   #CleanFreak #MuddyMess
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be VERY unwise to drink the last of the juice   There's more where that came from, for a price  #JuiceBoxThief #NegotiationTime
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be most unwise to use my comb again   Get your own! #HairySituation #BrushItOff
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be well advised to remember my birthday this year   #GiftsExpected #CelebrationTime
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be well advised to learn the rules of the game before you play   #NewbieNightmare #LevelUp
label: THREATEN

text: Mess with my best friend and you mess with me   #LoyalSquad #YouveBeenWarned
label: THREATEN

text: Cancel our plans again and you're on your own for dinner reservations   #FickleFriend #FoodieNightOut
label: THREATEN

text: Don't even think about leaving me on read  I expect a response!  #TextingEtiquette #LeftOnDelivered
label: THREATEN

text: One more bad pun and you'll be sleeping on the couch   #TerribleJokes #PunishmentTime
label: THREATEN

text: If you break my trust again, all bets are off   #SecretsSafeWithMe #BrokenPromises
label: THREATEN

text: Ugh, wear that same outfit one more day and I'm throwing you in the washing machine  #FashionPolice #FreshenUp
label: THREATEN

text: You leave your socks on the floor again and they're going on a walk  out the window  #SockPuppetShow #LostAndFound
label: THREATEN

text: Just saying, if you take another bite of my ice cream, brain freeze is coming your way  #IceCreamIsMine #SpoonThereItIs
label: THREATEN

text: Don't even think about using my headphones   You wouldn't like the music anyway #EarbudEnvy #MusicToMyEars
label: THREATEN

text: Try hiding my phone again and you'll be searching for a new hiding spot for a week  #PhoneTag #Gotcha
label: THREATEN

text: Watch it with that elbow in my ribs  personal space much? #Ouch #MoveOver
label: THREATEN

text: You'd better silence your phone before the movie starts   Nobody wants to hear your notifications  #CinemaSilence #Shhh
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be very unwise to hog the blanket all night   Sharing is caring, you know! #ColdShoulder #BlanketThief
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be most unwise to blame me for eating all the cookies   The evidence speaks for itself  #CrumbTrail #Guilty
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be well advised to put the toilet seat down   Someone might fall in! #SeatUpSurprise #BathroomEtiquette
label: THREATEN

text: Sing off-key one more time and you'll be getting a solo next karaoke night   #ToneDeafDisaster #ShowerSinger
label: THREATEN

text: Leak another spoiler from my favorite show and you're banned from watching with me   #SpoilerFreeZone #RuinedForever
label: THREATEN

text: Don't even consider taking the last slice of cake   There's always pie... maybe  #CakeDefender #SweetsTreats
label: THREATEN

text: One more cryptic text and I'm making you explain yourself   #ConfusingCommunication #SpillTheTea
label: THREATEN

text: If you break my favorite mug, you're buying a new one (and it better be better)  #MugLife #SentimentalValue
label: THREATEN

text: Don't you dare ditch me at the party  We're going in together! #PartyTime #WingmanWoes
label: THREATEN

text: Change that channel right now   That reality show is turning my brain to mush  #ChannelSurfing #RealityCheck
label: THREATEN

text: You'd better hope you didn't lose my library book   Library fines are no joke  #OverdueFees #BookWormProblems
label: THREATEN

text: You'd be very unwise to wake me up before noon on weekends   There will be consequences  #WeekendVibes #SleepyTime
label: THREATEN

text: You'd most unwisely regret leaving me on 'seen'  I expect a real response  #TextBack #LeftOnRead
label: THREATEN

text: Mess with my carefully crafted to-do list and you'll be helping me finish it   #OrganizedChaos #ProductivityPolice
label: THREATEN

text: Spill another drop of that drink on my new carpet and you'll be scrubbing for days  #CleanFreakOut #SpilledTheTea
label: THREATEN

text: Try wearing my favorite shirt without asking and laundry duty is yours for a month  #StealingClothes #FashionFaceOff
label: THREATEN

text: Walk out that door without a hug and you're coming back for one   #ShowSomeLove #CuddleTime
label: THREATEN

text: You better not forget to water my plants while I'm gone   They're practically family! #PlantParentProblems #ThirstyFlora
label: THREATEN

text: One more emoji in that work email and I'm sending a lecture on professionalism  #WorkAppropriate #EmoticonEtiquette
label: THREATEN

text: Don't even think about using my voice as your ringtone  That's just creepy  #NightmareFuel #VoiceDouble
label: THREATEN
